---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Is your feature request related to a problem?**
A clear description of the problem (e.g. "I find it difficult to...").

**Describe the feature**
What you'd like to see added or changed.

**Use case**
How would this feature be used? Who benefits?

**Alternatives considered**
Any workarounds or alternative approaches you've considered.

**Additional context**
Mockups, screenshots, or any other context.
